name: Add Ignore Player
description: Adds the target player to the NPC ignore list so they won't be targeted by hostile AI.

name: Remove Ignore Player
description: Removes the target player from the NPC ignore list, making them targetable again.

name: Clear Ignored Players
description: Clears the entire NPC ignore list, making all players targetable by AI.

name: Print Ignored Players
description: Prints the list of currently ignored players to the console.

name: Kill All Animals
description: Kills all animals on the server.

name: Kill All Scientists
description: Kills all scientists on the server.

name: Print AI Brain Stats
description: Prints the count of active AI brains on the map to the console.

name: Print AI Stats
description: Prints AI stats including difficulty, damage scale, aim cone, and cooldown scale to the console.
